privileged_info_summary: The task uses a pre-created HL7 ADT^A01 message containing a sample patient named KLEINSAMPLE. The message is in HL7 v2.3/v2.5 format and is transmitted via MLLP (Minimal Lower Layer Protocol) with start byte 0x0B and end bytes 0x1C 0x0D. A TCP channel is configured to listen on port 6661 for incoming MLLP-framed messages. The patient data (name, ID, demographics) is synthetic test data not derived from real patient records. Success is verified by checking channel statistics via REST API or PostgreSQL database queries.
